predictionUnderP02: P02 predicts repair should not materially change low-risk control
predictionUnderP03: P03 predicts replay integrity is sufficient for control claim
falsifier: low-risk control should weaken broad repair claims
requiredDataOrRepo: public data or public package metadata only
baseline: simple load/import or logistic baseline where relevant
negativeControl: shuffled label, protocol-absent control, or failed import control as relevant
metric: claim-safety label plus accuracy/macro-F1 where relevant
replayPlan: container-netoff or public evidence hash replay when feasible
